name: DeepSeek V3 — expert load statistics
notes: DeepSeek V3 uses 256 routed experts per MoE layer with top-8 routing. Expert load imbalance ratios (max_load / mean_load) are derived from Table 3 of the technical report and cross-validated against MoE-CAP profiling results. Imbalance is highest in early and final layers; middle layers are more balanced.
